title: glaux maritima subsp. obtusifolia
intro: Glaux maritima subsp. obtusifolia, also known as seaside sea-blite or sea blite, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Montiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-cancer, and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of Glaux maritima subsp. obtusifolia can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and digestive problems.
